title: 3PCS Table Placemats, Place Mats for Table Mats, White Frosted Placemats, 43x28cm Wipeable Dining Protectors for Kitchen Baking Pastry Coffee Crafts
features: Dining Table Accessories：Elevate your dining experience with these sleek white frosted placemats, designed as essential dining table accessories that blend style and functionality. The 43x28cm size fits most table settings, protecting from spills, heat, and scratches while adding a modern touch to your home.​

Wipeable Placemats：Say goodbye to stubborn stains these wipeable placemats feature a smooth frosted surface that resists food residue and liquids. A quick wipe with a damp cloth leaves them looking fresh, for daily meals and busy family kitchens.​

Washable Placemats：For deeper cleaning, simply rinse these washable placemats under running water or toss them in the sink for a thorough clean. The durable material withstands regular washing without fading or warping, maintaining their pristine appearance over time.​

Outdoor Placemats for Garden Table: The christmas placemats can not only serve as a table mat but also as a perfect office pad. For indoor and outdoor use, Suitable for many occasions. such as home kitchen, dining table, office room, study room, coffee shop, restaurant, hotel or business office.

Wipe Clean Placemats：The hassle-free wipe clean placemats design ensures quick cleanup after every meal, saving you time and effort. The frosted texture not only enhances grip for dishes but also hides minor spills, keeping your table looking neat and presentable.
